4F3BBCB14224C0D9FBD186A79E25A6FA: Your Storm Shield is in this location. Start your expansion from here!
E934C62A415D58D47CB7E69CC75656E7: Your Storm Shield is in this location. Start your expansion from here!
EB6EB99A43A77718ECCF2A900714C09E: Your Storm Shield is in this location. Start your expansion from here!
D154C3EB41E6B21B2D6DC5B03B46A66C: [ph] Horde: Bonus Heroes Survived (STW Accolade Token)

Dialogue.8AC31C674F47D7EA4120A4B32F4487AD_DA042F1: A happy team is a productive team!
Dialogue.F0FCC35D4D569F68605B709A97BF48C7_C2C5A2E: A little ammo, I command it!
Dialogue.169A60F444869E1A7E8B43B9B485CA19_DA042F1: Ah at the end of the day, it all comes down to friendship.
Dialogue.215A8638444D5B0C83DA3283FFFB641A_C2C5A2E: Ah man, this is my last clip.
Dialogue.DD893C3742737D3EFB000883CD0EC55A_861A10F: Ah, I think I know that one.
Dialogue.F54527F2493FC197CD2864A02D0FC981_DA042F1: Ah, well, that was just the first version, the second one will have less gloop, more pow.
Dialogue.5C98027443945563403C2C9CA9EE1E7F_C2C5A2E: Allow me to put it this way: no.
Dialogue.1ECE97A84B58482ABA569EA52BABD3AB_861A10F: Anyone got a ticket to half of the gun show?
Dialogue.A3BCA0D143C4FC0BFDC3478F0021CA56_C2C5A2E: Aww man, a flinger? So cool.
Dialogue.269274E6457021EF7F75D1A233BFF377_861A10F: Bet he thought that was going to go better for him.
Dialogue.ADC5B2664B713184BB76E083E2752968_861A10F: Big boy fall down go boom.
Dialogue.DDFD3D784A1D11FE80A1BDA7B2D237F3_DA042F1: Can I interest you in some cutting edge weaponry?
Dialogue.8B03038049B491FC40F72BA8A31D3FFD_0ADEFA4: Can you get me out of here?
Dialogue.DF0E3E324922E0715B789586E54940C9_0ADEFA4: Can you help me with something.
Dialogue.CE81CF47402F4AE70E1707963751EDC2_C2C5A2E: DO NOT go on without me! Heal me!
Dialogue.72BC9DDD490F9766C75694B15B1046EB_DA042F1: Do we have to drag every idiot kicking and screaming into Home Base
Dialogue.797F72574F040037C07506A29216A5AF_C2C5A2E: Don't just leave me to the storm. Help me!
Dialogue.08E9FC704D6CF9691924B2BD95FBC38B_C2C5A2E: Ever heard of healing? Cuz I need it.
Dialogue.1B931E75487121D4723D08A7C3E51882_DA042F1: Extermination is the sincerest form of flattery.
Dialogue.739E2E8B473D771AE6EACEA3CA6AE3F0_DA042F1: First place in the Llama race
Dialogue.2F95A56043D83F98B7D23695EF945533_C2C5A2E: Flinger! That means husks in the air!
Dialogue.C98AD2B148EA03B2ADC561A10B4B7EB1_861A10F: For husks' sakes, someone kill that flinger.
Dialogue.3F44E5C64155DF62A37CF98A76710F74_861A10F: Get ready for enemies over here!
Dialogue.5FE14E964183A3B642D9D08FF88D6D16_C2C5A2E: Health, please! Where is a page when one needs one?
Dialogue.5554D9E6400FA5D9503156A3CA4B0A8F_C2C5A2E: Health? Yeah, I could use some.
Dialogue.13CC68AC43F70BF1A3A10DA1AC296DC2_861A10F: Here's a little somethin somethin for ya.
Dialogue.213C331B4E64AD8312FD988F60EE2A7E_861A10F: Hey, I was thinkin' of you…
Dialogue.4D680A32495F981B3D3249B3D29A0A8D_DA042F1: Hey, check out this nice loot.
Dialogue.C0FB18F7424C445DD66A56B09F12B96D_861A10F: Hey, smasher! This is my fort!
Dialogue.5A3926F7444288F96E0389A21B897C45_C2C5A2E: I am in need of health, friend.
Dialogue.40C2E68D4A921E5EAA13DC960207C51A_C2C5A2E: I am in need of health, good citizen.
Dialogue.8C8E772D46ADE4D8758BADB62108D506_C2C5A2E: I am in need of health.
Dialogue.3EF715D84A05897D92193E8F66BB2C14_0ADEFA4: I can't believe it! You're the best.
Dialogue.5B19574547D56C94EEB9F9BF7E262128_DA042F1: I could build this out of something as simple as old vaccum cleaners, if you could find the parts
Dialogue.F476AA3E4B781F9F1DF208A749E1C74D_861A10F: I don't care for that one.
Dialogue.F854B08E47FF4BC2D3DF3C8C84B32442_DA042F1: I knew we'd make a good team.
Dialogue.C35E98B64584D69B783C458123915C40_DA042F1: I won't let ya down, Commander!
Dialogue.B0F088D34946F47A7155A78EA928CF3D_861A10F: I'll have to watch my goods around you.
Dialogue.B321A4724B4530E51B0F99BBBC90863B_0ADEFA4: I'm trapped and under attack! This is so unfair!
Dialogue.7B1026864F8D7F4B77AD4C986C36269D_C2C5A2E: If ammo had fumes, I'd be runnin' on 'em.
Dialogue.C10BD5CE4383405D3B8F0D93FC513431_861A10F: Is that how you treat your friends?
Dialogue.E631B73F48193BC5020AFF9D2D198FA7_DA042F1: Is this something I should be worried about?
Dialogue.1D8DDF0F464B8BAF525249975D0802DF_DA042F1: It's a dangerous world out there, Commander.
Dialogue.BC0386724B951F25E85DAFA8741E731B_DA042F1: It's a lovely day for loot.
Dialogue.DBB70C61429C763F7B20B5B06F4BDDF4_861A10F: Just dealing a bit of death.
Dialogue.534D0136431E50303E38BEA24BB6A577_DA042F1: Just trying to do my part, thanks!
Dialogue.165524474FE02B775A9110BFAFD7CEC5_DA042F1: Let's go give those survivors a fighting chance.
Dialogue.6EEE7955402128434CC815A99DD5EF91_DA042F1: Listen, I want to help and weapons is what I do.
Dialogue.E796C4D340C97E4A253C26BD713F475E_C2C5A2E: Look sharp! Those flingers fling husks!
Dialogue.F565F01042507BF27B3C01A430FB0A7E_861A10F: My sledge is at your service.
Dialogue.0EB1D3E34FC7D586D59058BCB5C7CA94_861A10F: Never get between a lady and her tools.
Dialogue.2915EE54492A911DC14657B9693E6646_DA042F1: No one ever said, "Oh, you make guns. Let's be friends."
Dialogue.1BD9EA4944E352237C1E61AB49A6D88F_0ADEFA4: No one is going to believe this.
Dialogue.8EB7F1734C929B472A90699E31E0FEEA_DA042F1: Oh yeah, you got the goods.
Dialogue.AC9C1EC44C24ED445C8AB3ABE7DD25CF_C2C5A2E: Oh! That thing will smash the fort!
Dialogue.F506C50747F5662E3B9EEEA62AEDC4A5_DA042F1: Oh, it's coming back to me.
Dialogue.007607CA44D43B7B7E30A49A0CC17008_861A10F: Oh, no. These wounds feel mortal…
Dialogue.535FE9B3422A64235CA54CA372C68BB8_861A10F: Oh, no. They're walking our way.
Dialogue.11A91D3441725006F58AD59558206C55_DA042F1: Okay, let's see what we're dealing with.
Dialogue.77A953554243363181C8C481AC2D4983_861A10F: Send that smasher back to cloud town.
Dialogue.7408AE044D9DD85B30EAB1981F762197_C2C5A2E: Smashers and this fort don't mix.
Dialogue.2CC32DC746C6190F3492889D29B57608_DA042F1: So I guess we're doing this thing.
Dialogue.107F6D024C895B65ADF1E5AD03FE42C8_0ADEFA4: Thanks again for your help, see you soon.
Dialogue.0938A6BF450DC418334D9E8C8D0A9125_DA042F1: Thanks for finding all these useful parts
Dialogue.B06E33B54893565FDEBC81805E3BF028_1E93A0F: Think of me when you think of danger.
Dialogue.BAF4BD7B472756BB8874AFBBBE379E26_DA042F1: Think you can give me a hand? I've got guns to make
Dialogue.27355DBB47B178749FE41DAC8B4021A4_C2C5A2E: This fort can't hold back smashers!
Dialogue.6860743143B3FD7750E7ED8431633296_1E93A0F: This is what friendship looks like.
Dialogue.4D6C34764A13317BFB3FBAB16F4EC52B_C2C5A2E: Those flingers are going to start flinging!
Dialogue.AB9A580A4DAECED918C572B660F5D94F_DA042F1: Those parts are all looking great, Commander. Thank you.
Dialogue.E0081618445218D95B9EBEB1C9280D8C_861A10F: Time to get my hands dirty!
Dialogue.477623314766BF0BA3F662BD8E1308F9_0ADEFA4: Uh, hi! I need a small favor!
Dialogue.D84DA75D431BCBD28CF0C0BD7A44CEBF_DA042F1: Wait is that easy to do now?
Dialogue.DCBB27074927385463E8BEAB3C038A55_C2C5A2E: Want more shooting? Need more ammo.
Dialogue.C68DE5C04122A31FEF6AF6AC42F0669A_861A10F: Was that a flock or a gaggle?
Dialogue.B7AAA27C4BA32DA412AC77A9FB535389_C2C5A2E: We have a troll here. Ugh, vermin!
Dialogue.92E3AF84469356FE9DF51F8ED9E6D603_0ADEFA4: We need more people like you.
Dialogue.08B52CB8406D962A38AF7B9FBC13C487_DA042F1: We're gonna have so much fun together!
Dialogue.9519609246043BAAD49A04ABFA5742B6_DA042F1: Well then lets jump right to the gruesome stuff.
Dialogue.3B0311B14553C3F5E791B4A16B810118_DA042F1: What you meant to say was, "Sir, yes sir!"
Dialogue.DB020E354A97C37276AF5AA407845DE2_861A10F: Why did it have to be a flinger?
Dialogue.4C260D75426FBE055C83DA972457441A_0ADEFA4: You have to help me get out of here!
Dialogue.25EA3D5548FDF54FAD8893B924A5D4E7_861A10F: You know we're gonna win, yeah?
Dialogue.71F501BE4EC87B6013EF84938182636E_DA042F1: You know, Llamas are the camels of the sky.
Dialogue.5A26422C4E932009A85FAA9F0953E0D8_861A10F: You look like you could use this.
Dialogue.6541E7BE48C18B8E5AC2B5ACF2A80A6F_861A10F: You. Big guy. Respect the architecture.
